title: geranium robertianum var. mediterraneum
intro: Geranium robertianum var. mediterraneum, also known as the lesser geranium or herbe-de-roc, is a perennial plant in the geranium family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to treat digestive issues and promote wound healing. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as bronchitis and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
